description: Business that represents a customer or potential customer. The company that is billed in business transactions.

description: Person with whom a business unit has a relationship, such as customer, supplier, and colleague.

description: A company that contracted the Insurer (sometime via an Agency/Agent) to issue policies under a set of product’s terms and conditions.

cdm_manifest: Property and Casualty Data Model CDM manifest
description: An office or intermediary where insurance is sold and can be independent or an Insurer office.

description: Information about the Agent, or other insurance representative who has responsibility for selling insurance.

description: Information about the relationship between the Agency and the Agent.

description: Information about the relationship between the Insurer and the Agent.

description: Details (attributes) extensions to an Insured Asset which varies based on Line of business. e.g., vehicle for Auto insurance, apartment for home insurance.

description: A definition of an asset detail (attribute) which is later used when extending a Policy Insured Asset’s detail.

description: Country and State where business is authorized/not authorized to be conducted.

description: Information about the relationship between the broker and its Agency.

description: The perils that can trigger damage or loss. Relates to Policy's Coverages, Exclusions and Inclusions.

description: The inventory of all cause of loss.

description: Definition of cause of loss related to Coverages/Exclusions/Inclusion for a Line of business. One or more LOBs comprise a product which is subsequently used to create a Policy.

description: A demand raised by a customer with an active Insurance Policy to recover in the event of a loss that is covered under their Policy.

description: Captures any updates that happen to the claim incident.

description: Generic country table.

description: Protection provided by the Insurer and the level of indemnification provided under an Insurance Policy, example include liability, earthquake, or collision.

cdm_manifest: Property and Casualty Data Model CDM manifest
description: Inventory of all Coverages which are subsequently used to create the Line of business.

cdm_manifest: Property and Casualty Data Model CDM manifest
description: Details (attributes) extensions to a Coverage which varies based on Line of business.

cdm_manifest: Property and Casualty Data Model CDM manifest
description: A definition of a Coverage detail (attribute) which is later used when extending a Policy Coverages detail.

cdm_manifest: Property and Casualty Data Model CDM manifest
description: Definition of Coverage for a Line of business. One or more LOBs comprise a product which is subsequently used to create a Policy.

cdm_manifest: Property and Casualty Data Model CDM manifest
description: The details type provides additional semantics to the Coverage/Insured Assets details, to be used when performing analytics on the details extended information.

cdm_manifest: Property and Casualty Data Model CDM manifest
description: Information about the relationship between the contract (e.g., Policy) and a party, including the party role relating to the document.

cdm_manifest: Property and Casualty Data Model CDM manifest
description: A provision related to hazards, circumstances, or specific property not covered by the Insurance Policy (related to a Coverage).

cdm_manifest: Property and Casualty Data Model CDM manifest
description: Inventory of all Exclusions/Inclusions which are subsequently used to create the Line of business.

cdm_manifest: Property and Casualty Data Model CDM manifest
description: Definition of provisions related to Coverages for a Line of business. One or more LOBs comprise a product which is subsequently used to create a Policy.

cdm_manifest: Property and Casualty Data Model CDM manifest
description: Information about the relationship between the Insured Asset/location and a claim.

description: Information about an Insured Asset's location. In many cases the asset's location (e.g., car parking lot, mall) are also insured with the asset.

cdm_manifest: Property and Casualty Data Model CDM manifest
description: Information about the relationship between the Insured Asset and its location.

cdm_manifest: Property and Casualty Data Model CDM manifest
description: Information of an Insured Auto.

cdm_manifest: Property and Casualty Data Model CDM manifest
description: Information on a generic insurable item. Insured cars and Homes have specialized tables. The model can be extended by adding other specialized Insured Asset tables.

cdm_manifest: Property and Casualty Data Model CDM manifest
description: Information of an Insured Home.

cdm_manifest: Property and Casualty Data Model CDM manifest
description: Information about the business that insures or carries the insurance policies. e.g., insurance company. An Insurer can relate to a parent Insurer as in the case of subsidiaries.

cdm_manifest: Property and Casualty Data Model CDM manifest
description: Information about the relationship between an Insurer and an Agency.

cdm_manifest: Property and Casualty Data Model CDM manifest
description: A Line of business definition (Coverages, exclusions, Inclusions, cause of loss, details). One or more LOBs comprise a product which is subsequently used to create a Policy.

cdm_manifest: Property and Casualty Data Model CDM manifest
description: Information about the relationship between a Line of business and a detail in the details catalog. This information is subsequently used, in conjunction with Insured Asset/location categories, to create the details extensions for the Insured Assets in the generated Policy.

cdm_manifest: Property and Casualty Data Model CDM manifest
description: Inventory of all LOBs which are subsequently used to create the Line of business.

cdm_manifest: Property and Casualty Data Model CDM manifest
description: Any payment that relates to a Policy, e.g., Policy monthly premium payment from the insured to the Insurer, claim payment from the Insurer to the insured, payment to the tow company for towing a damaged car.

cdm_manifest: Property and Casualty Data Model CDM manifest
description: Participants of a payment transaction.

cdm_manifest: Property and Casualty Data Model CDM manifest
description: A contract of insurance between the customer and the Insurer. The Policy relates to a parent Policy. This provides support to different scenarios, e.g., handling Policy amendments (add only the new amendments to a child Policy record) or handling collective policies.

cdm_manifest: Property and Casualty Data Model CDM manifest
description: Information about the relationship between an Insurance Policy and Agency.

cdm_manifest: Property and Casualty Data Model CDM manifest
description: Information about the relationship between the Agent and a Policy he handles.

description: Definitions of Policy product. A product is comprised of one or more Line of business.

cdm_manifest: Property and Casualty Data Model CDM manifest
description: Information about the relationship between a Policy product and one or more lines of business.

cdm_manifest: Property and Casualty Data Model CDM manifest
description: A Policy transaction provides information of each transaction (e.g., amendment) of the Policy.

cdm_manifest: Property and Casualty Data Model CDM manifest
description: A permit from an authority for insurance professionals, for example to sell insurance policies.

cdm_manifest: Property and Casualty Data Model CDM manifest
description:
A related party having an agreement with an insurance party on a contract.
1. Party:an insurance entity (Insurer, Agent...)
2. Related party:either a 1st party (a law office being insured), or a 3rd party (a law office handling a claim).
3. Contract part - Policy, claim...

description: Generic State/Province table.

description: Reference to terms and conditions applicable to various catalog parts.
